<?php /* * This file is part of the DebugBar package. * * (c) 2013 Maxime Bouroumeau-Fuseau * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace DebugBar\DataCollector; use DebugBar\DataFormatter\HasDataFormatter; use DebugBar\DataFormatter\HasXdebugLinks; /** * Abstract class for data collectors */ abstract class DataCollector implements DataCollectorInterface { use HasDataFormatter, HasXdebugLinks; public static $defaultDataFormatter; public static $defaultVarDumper; }
